qa_pairs.question: How can I see a list of my detached terminal sessions using GNU Screen?
qa_pairs.answer: You can view a list of your detached terminal sessions on a node by using the command `screen -list`.

qa_pairs.question: What does the output of `screen -list` look like?
qa_pairs.answer: An example output for `screen -list` is: `There is a screen on: 164133.foo (Attached)1 Socket in /tmp/S-stubbsda.`

qa_pairs.question: How do I reattach to an existing GNU Screen session?
qa_pairs.answer: You can attach to one of your GNU Screen sessions using the command `screen -d -r <session name>`.
